name: Crockpot Beef Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 to 2 1/2 lbs boneless beef chuck or round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef into strips or cubes and season with salt and pepper.
2. Place the seasoned beef in the bottom of the crockpot.
3. In a small bowl, mix together garlic salt, Worcestershire sauce, beef bouillon, and catsup.
4. Pour the mixture over the meat.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 6-8 hours, or until the beef is tender. If desired, switch to High heat.
6. Add 2 tablespoons of dry white wine and sliced mushrooms.
7. In another small bowl, dissolve flour in a little water.
8. Stir the flour mixture into the meat mixture.
9. Cook on High for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until slightly thickened.
10. Stir in sour cream.
11. Turn off heat and serve with rice or noodles.
